indication: IBRANCE (palbociclib) is indicated for the treatment of pre/perimenopausal or postmenopausal women, or men with hormone receptor (HR)-positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer in combination with fulvestrant in patients with disease progression after prior endocrine therapy.
description: Health Canada approved palbociclib in combination with fulvestrant for the treatment of pre/perimenopausal or postmenopausal women, or men with HR-positive, HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression after prior endocrine therapy.
raw_cancer_type: locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer

document.name: Ibrance (palbociclib) [product monograph]. HC.
